Instruction: How do I get from Cowgill Hall to Norris Hall

Output: Exit Cowgill Hall top level door and head for Hancock Hall which is just a short 200-foot walk to your left. Once you reach there, turn left and head down that path for about two blocks, passing the large hokie stone building on your left. From there, you're gonna hit a set of stairs; take those and then turn left for one last short stretch. Norris Hall will be the first building you see on your left with the large wood door.

Output: Exit War Memorial Hall main doors and take a quick left for about 50 yards until you reach the sidewalk. Cross the street and walk straight for nearly half a mile across the entire Drillfield lot. Cross the second crosswalk and take a slight right to continue up the path. Once you meet those two sets of stairs, take them both; Hitt Hall will be the first building you see on your left with the modern glass and steel look.
